name: Stew Without Tears
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Broccoli, cut into florets and sliced stems
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium pan, bring the curry sauce and beef stock to a boil. Reduce heat to low.
2. Quickly stir fry the beef in a wok until sealed, then add it to the sauce and stock mixture.
3. Poach for 30 minutes to an hour until the beef is tender. Add the broccoli and stir until barely cooked.
